name: 法研·法律法规检索
description: Support natural language to obtain accurate and currently effective regulatory provisions, seamlessly integrating high-quality and massive regulatory knowledge bases into various AI applications and workflows.
description_zh: 法研·法律法规检索，支持自然语言获取精准、现行有效的法规条文，将高质量、海量的法规知识库，无缝接入各类AI应用与工作流中。
description_en: Support natural language to obtain accurate and currently effective regulatory provisions, seamlessly integrating high-quality and massive regulatory knowledge bases into various AI applications and workflows.
examples_zh: 不满两周岁子女抚养权
中华人民共和国民法典第一千零八十四条
examples_en: Child custody for children under two years of age
Article 1084 of the Civil Code of the People's Republic of China
